slides.title: First-Order ODEs: Core Concepts
slides.contentBeforeEquation: A first-order ODE relates a function

slides.title: Homogeneous ODEs
slides.contentBeforeEquation: Equations where all terms have the same degree. Use substitution

slides.title: Common Pitfalls
slides.content:
1) Forgetting +C in integration
2) Misapplying substitution in homogeneous ODEs
3) Incorrect integrating factor calculation
4) Algebraic errors when separating variables

slides.title: Method Selection Guide
slides.contentBeforeEquation:
1) Is y' = f(x)? → Explicit
2) Can you write as f(x)g(y)? → Separable
3) All terms same degree? → Homogeneous
4) Linear in y and y'? → Integrating factor

slides.title: Recap
slides.content:
Key skills:
1) Recognize ODE types
2) Apply appropriate solution methods
3) Verify solutions by differentiation
4) Handle initial conditions
